title: 600pcs Round Wiggle Googly Eyes Self-Adhesive DIY Crafts (0.5cm) - Black, Clear - Chrome - Cartoon - Indoor - Stickers
features: Package: Each package includes 600 pieces of wiggle googly eyes with a diameter of 5 mm/ 0. 20 inch; the abundant quantity can fully meet your daily use and creative enthusiasm.

Quality Plastic: Made of quality plastic and glue, self-adhesive wiggle eyes are reliable to use with self-adhesive design, which can stick well to the surface you want, the black eyes under the clear plastic can be shaken at will, full of fun and vivid in style.

Easy To Use: You only need to peel off the release paper on the back of each swinging Google eye, and then stick it to any place you want to decorate. The adhesive is firm and does not fall off easily, making your life look more interesting.

Perfect Gift: For children, these felts and eyes are a perfect gift for exercising their creativity and practical skills and enhancing the interest in life. Enjoy the time of the do-it-yourself together, the finished work can be given as a Christmas present to friends and relatives.

Wide Use: Wiggle eyes can be used for arts and crafts, decoration, dolls, small plastic toys, or even giving you a little bit more personality! You can also stick it to your computer, photos, phone, lunchbox, stapler, ruler, mug, stationary, TV remote or smart home device.
